spec_text:
SPEC-MP-854: Mounting Plate MP-854 Design Requirements
Material: Steel AISI 1018

Rule R1: Hole diameters shall conform to the tolerances specified in Table A based on Material Class.
  Nominal diameter for Zone A holes: 8.0 mm.
  Nominal diameter for Zone B holes: 12.0 mm.

Rule R4: All bolt holes must be populated with fasteners. Empty holes are not permitted in the final assembly.

Rule R3: For Material Class I, the minimum hole-to-hole spacing in Zone A shall be 35.0 mm.
  Rule R3 does not apply to Zone B.

Rule R2: Edge distance requirements depend on hole zone:
  (a) Zone A: edge distance ≥ 1.5× hole diameter
  (b) Zone B: edge distance ≥ 1.5× hole diameter

Table A: Diameter tolerances by Material Class
| Material Class | Small holes (nom ≤ 10mm) | Large holes (nom > 10mm) |
|----------------|--------------------------|--------------------------|
| Class I        | ± 0.8 mm                 | ± 0.4 mm                 |
| Class II       | ± 0.5 mm                 | ± 0.8 mm                 |
| Class III      | ± 1.0 mm                 | ± 1.5 mm                 |

Note: Material Class is determined by material type:
  Steel → Class I  |    Aluminum → Class II  |    Composite → Class III

spec_text:
SPEC-SP-548: Support Plate SP-548 Design Requirements
Material: Aluminum 6061-T6

Rule R1: Hole diameters shall conform to the tolerances specified in Table A based on Material Class.
  Nominal diameter for Zone A holes: 6.0 mm.
  Nominal diameter for Zone B holes: 16.0 mm.

Rule R2: Edge distance requirements depend on hole zone:
  (a) Zone A: edge distance ≥ 2.5× hole diameter
  (b) Zone B: edge distance ≥ 1.5× hole diameter

Rule R3: For Material Class II, the minimum hole-to-hole spacing in Zone B shall be 25.0 mm.
  Rule R3 does not apply to Zone A.

Rule R4: All bolt holes must be populated with fasteners. Empty holes are not permitted in the final assembly.

Table A: Diameter tolerances by Material Class
| Material Class | Small holes (nom ≤ 10mm) | Large holes (nom > 10mm) |
|----------------|--------------------------|--------------------------|
| Class I        | ± 0.3 mm                 | ± 0.4 mm                 |
| Class II       | ± 1.0 mm                 | ± 0.3 mm                 |
| Class III      | ± 1.0 mm                 | ± 1.5 mm                 |

Note: Material Class is determined by material type:
  Steel → Class I  |    Aluminum → Class II  |    Composite → Class III

spec_text:
SPEC-GP-639: Guide Plate GP-639 Design Requirements
Material: Composite CFRP

Rule R1: Hole diameters shall conform to the tolerances specified in Table A based on Material Class.
  Nominal diameter for Zone A holes: 10.0 mm.
  Nominal diameter for Zone B holes: 12.0 mm.

Rule R2: Edge distance requirements depend on hole zone:
  (a) Zone A: edge distance ≥ 1.5× hole diameter
  (b) Zone B: edge distance ≥ 1.5× hole diameter

Rule R3: For Material Class III, the minimum hole-to-hole spacing in Zone B shall be 35.0 mm.
  Rule R3 does not apply to Zone A.

Rule R4: All bolt holes must be populated with fasteners. Empty holes are not permitted in the final assembly.

Table A: Diameter tolerances by Material Class
| Material Class | Small holes (nom ≤ 10mm) | Large holes (nom > 10mm) |
|----------------|--------------------------|--------------------------|
| Class I        | ± 0.3 mm                 | ± 0.4 mm                 |
| Class II       | ± 0.5 mm                 | ± 0.8 mm                 |
| Class III      | ± 0.4 mm                 | ± 0.4 mm                 |

Note: Material Class is determined by material type:
  Steel → Class I  |    Aluminum → Class II  |    Composite → Class III

spec_text:
SPEC-MP-194: Mounting Plate MP-194 Design Requirements
Material: Aluminum 6061-T6

Rule R1: Hole diameters shall conform to the tolerances specified in Table A based on Material Class.
  Nominal diameter for Zone A holes: 8.0 mm.
  Nominal diameter for Zone B holes: 14.0 mm.

Rule R4: All bolt holes must be populated with fasteners. Empty holes are not permitted in the final assembly.

Rule R2: Edge distance requirements depend on hole zone:
  (a) Zone A: edge distance ≥ 1.5× hole diameter
  (b) Zone B: edge distance ≥ 1.5× hole diameter

Rule R3: For Material Class II, the minimum hole-to-hole spacing in Zone B shall be 30.0 mm.
  Rule R3 does not apply to Zone A.

Table A: Diameter tolerances by Material Class
| Material Class | Small holes (nom ≤ 10mm) | Large holes (nom > 10mm) |
|----------------|--------------------------|--------------------------|
| Class I        | ± 0.3 mm                 | ± 0.4 mm                 |
| Class II       | ± 1.0 mm                 | ± 1.0 mm                 |
| Class III      | ± 1.0 mm                 | ± 1.5 mm                 |

Note: Material Class is determined by material type:
  Steel → Class I  |    Aluminum → Class II  |    Composite → Class III

spec_text:
SPEC-BP-657: Bracket Plate BP-657 Design Requirements
Material: Aluminum 6061-T6

Rule R2: Edge distance requirements depend on hole zone:
  (a) Zone A: edge distance ≥ 2.0× hole diameter
  (b) Zone B: edge distance ≥ 1.5× hole diameter

Rule R4: All bolt holes must be populated with fasteners. Empty holes are not permitted in the final assembly.

Rule R1: Hole diameters shall conform to the tolerances specified in Table A based on Material Class.
  Nominal diameter for Zone A holes: 10.0 mm.
  Nominal diameter for Zone B holes: 12.0 mm.

Rule R3: For Material Class II, the minimum hole-to-hole spacing in Zone A shall be 35.0 mm.
  Rule R3 does not apply to Zone B.

Table A: Diameter tolerances by Material Class
| Material Class | Small holes (nom ≤ 10mm) | Large holes (nom > 10mm) |
|----------------|--------------------------|--------------------------|
| Class I        | ± 0.3 mm                 | ± 0.4 mm                 |
| Class II       | ± 0.5 mm                 | ± 0.3 mm                 |
| Class III      | ± 1.0 mm                 | ± 1.5 mm                 |

Note: Material Class is determined by material type:
  Steel → Class I  |    Aluminum → Class II  |    Composite → Class III

SPEC-FP-323: Flange Plate FP-323 Design Requirements
Material: Steel AISI 1018

Rule R1: Hole diameters shall conform to the tolerances specified in Table A based on Material Class.
  Nominal diameter for Zone A holes: 8.0 mm.
  Nominal diameter for Zone B holes: 12.0 mm.

Rule R4: All bolt holes must be populated with fasteners. Empty holes are not permitted in the final assembly.

Rule R3: For Material Class I, the minimum hole-to-hole spacing in Zone B shall be 30.0 mm.
  Rule R3 does not apply to Zone A.

Rule R2: Edge distance requirements depend on hole zone:
  (a) Zone A: edge distance ≥ 1.5× hole diameter
  (b) Zone B: edge distance ≥ 1.5× hole diameter

spec_text:
SPEC-BP-127: Bracket Plate BP-127 Design Requirements
Material: Steel AISI 1018

Rule R2: Edge distance requirements depend on hole zone:
  (a) Zone A: edge distance ≥ 1.5× hole diameter
  (b) Zone B: edge distance ≥ 1.5× hole diameter

Rule R4: All bolt holes must be populated with fasteners. Empty holes are not permitted in the final assembly.

Rule R1: Hole diameters shall conform to the tolerances specified in Table A based on Material Class.
  Nominal diameter for Zone A holes: 10.0 mm.
  Nominal diameter for Zone B holes: 14.0 mm.

Rule R3: For Material Class I, the minimum hole-to-hole spacing in Zone B shall be 25.0 mm.
  Rule R3 does not apply to Zone A.

Table A: Diameter tolerances by Material Class
| Material Class | Small holes (nom ≤ 10mm) | Large holes (nom > 10mm) |
|----------------|--------------------------|--------------------------|
| Class I        | ± 0.4 mm                 | ± 1.0 mm                 |
| Class II       | ± 0.5 mm                 | ± 0.8 mm                 |
| Class III      | ± 1.0 mm                 | ± 1.5 mm                 |

Note: Material Class is determined by material type:
  Steel → Class I  |    Aluminum → Class II  |    Composite → Class III

SPEC-SP-697: Support Plate SP-697 Design Requirements
Material: Composite CFRP

Rule R4: All bolt holes must be populated with fasteners. Empty holes are not permitted in the final assembly.

Rule R2: Edge distance requirements depend on hole zone:
  (a) Zone A: edge distance ≥ 2.0× hole diameter
  (b) Zone B: edge distance ≥ 1.5× hole diameter

Rule R1: Hole diameters shall conform to the tolerances specified in Table A based on Material Class.
  Nominal diameter for Zone A holes: 6.0 mm.
  Nominal diameter for Zone B holes: 12.0 mm.

Rule R3: For Material Class III, the minimum hole-to-hole spacing in Zone A shall be 30.0 mm.
  Rule R3 does not apply to Zone B.

Table A: Diameter tolerances by Material Class
| Material Class | Small holes (nom ≤ 10mm) | Large holes (nom > 10mm) |
|----------------|--------------------------|--------------------------|
| Class I        | ± 0.3 mm                 | ± 0.4 mm                 |
| Class II       | ± 0.5 mm                 | ± 0.8 mm                 |
| Class III      | ± 0.5 mm                 | ± 0.5 mm                 |

Note: Material Class is determined by material type:
  Steel → Class I  |    Aluminum → Class II  |    Composite → Class III

spec_text:
SPEC-FP-721: Flange Plate FP-721 Design Requirements
Material: Steel AISI 1018

Rule R3: For Material Class I, the minimum hole-to-hole spacing in Zone B shall be 35.0 mm.
  Rule R3 does not apply to Zone A.

Rule R4: All bolt holes must be populated with fasteners. Empty holes are not permitted in the final assembly.

Rule R1: Hole diameters shall conform to the tolerances specified in Table A based on Material Class.
  Nominal diameter for Zone A holes: 10.0 mm.
  Nominal diameter for Zone B holes: 12.0 mm.

Rule R2: Edge distance requirements depend on hole zone:
  (a) Zone A: edge distance ≥ 1.5× hole diameter
  (b) Zone B: edge distance ≥ 1.5× hole diameter

Table A: Diameter tolerances by Material Class
| Material Class | Small holes (nom ≤ 10mm) | Large holes (nom > 10mm) |
|----------------|--------------------------|--------------------------|
| Class I        | ± 0.3 mm                 | ± 0.3 mm                 |
| Class II       | ± 0.5 mm                 | ± 0.8 mm                 |
| Class III      | ± 1.0 mm                 | ± 1.5 mm                 |

Note: Material Class is determined by material type:
  Steel → Class I  |    Aluminum → Class II  |    Composite → Class III

| Material Class | Small holes (nom ≤ 10mm) | Large holes (nom > 10mm) |
|----------------|--------------------------|--------------------------|
| Class I        | ± 0.5 mm                 | ± 0.3 mm                 |
| Class II       | ± 0.5 mm                 | ± 0.8 mm                 |
| Class III      | ± 1.0 mm                 | ± 1.5 mm                 |

  Steel → Class I  |    Aluminum → Class II  |    Composite → Class III

spec_text:
SPEC-FP-585: Flange Plate FP-585 Design Requirements
Material: Steel AISI 1018

Rule R4: All bolt holes must be populated with fasteners. Empty holes are not permitted in the final assembly.

Rule R1: Hole diameters shall conform to the tolerances specified in Table A based on Material Class.
  Nominal diameter for Zone A holes: 10.0 mm.
  Nominal diameter for Zone B holes: 12.0 mm.

Rule R3: For Material Class I, the minimum hole-to-hole spacing in Zone A shall be 35.0 mm.
  Rule R3 does not apply to Zone B.

Rule R2: Edge distance requirements depend on hole zone:
  (a) Zone A: edge distance ≥ 1.5× hole diameter
  (b) Zone B: edge distance ≥ 1.5× hole diameter

Table A: Diameter tolerances by Material Class
| Material Class | Small holes (nom ≤ 10mm) | Large holes (nom > 10mm) |
|----------------|--------------------------|--------------------------|
| Class I        | ± 0.5 mm                 | ± 1.0 mm                 |
| Class II       | ± 0.5 mm                 | ± 0.8 mm                 |
| Class III      | ± 1.0 mm                 | ± 1.5 mm                 |

Note: Material Class is determined by material type:
  Steel → Class I  |    Aluminum → Class II  |    Composite → Class III

spec_text:
SPEC-MP-207: Mounting Plate MP-207 Design Requirements
Material: Composite CFRP

Rule R4: All bolt holes must be populated with fasteners. Empty holes are not permitted in the final assembly.

Rule R2: Edge distance requirements depend on hole zone:
  (a) Zone A: edge distance ≥ 1.5× hole diameter
  (b) Zone B: edge distance ≥ 1.5× hole diameter

Rule R3: For Material Class III, the minimum hole-to-hole spacing in Zone A shall be 20.0 mm.
  Rule R3 does not apply to Zone B.

Rule R1: Hole diameters shall conform to the tolerances specified in Table A based on Material Class.
  Nominal diameter for Zone A holes: 10.0 mm.
  Nominal diameter for Zone B holes: 12.0 mm.

Table A: Diameter tolerances by Material Class
| Material Class | Small holes (nom ≤ 10mm) | Large holes (nom > 10mm) |
|----------------|--------------------------|--------------------------|
| Class I        | ± 0.3 mm                 | ± 0.4 mm                 |
| Class II       | ± 0.5 mm                 | ± 0.8 mm                 |
| Class III      | ± 1.0 mm                 | ± 1.0 mm                 |

Note: Material Class is determined by material type:
  Steel → Class I  |    Aluminum → Class II  |    Composite → Class III

spec_text:
SPEC-FP-482: Flange Plate FP-482 Design Requirements
Material: Aluminum 6061-T6

Rule R4: All bolt holes must be populated with fasteners. Empty holes are not permitted in the final assembly.

Rule R1: Hole diameters shall conform to the tolerances specified in Table A based on Material Class.
  Nominal diameter for Zone A holes: 6.0 mm.
  Nominal diameter for Zone B holes: 12.0 mm.

Rule R2: Edge distance requirements depend on hole zone:
  (a) Zone A: edge distance ≥ 2.0× hole diameter
  (b) Zone B: edge distance ≥ 1.5× hole diameter

Rule R3: For Material Class II, the minimum hole-to-hole spacing in Zone A shall be 35.0 mm.
  Rule R3 does not apply to Zone B.

Table A: Diameter tolerances by Material Class
| Material Class | Small holes (nom ≤ 10mm) | Large holes (nom > 10mm) |
|----------------|--------------------------|--------------------------|
| Class I        | ± 0.3 mm                 | ± 0.4 mm                 |
| Class II       | ± 0.3 mm                 | ± 0.8 mm                 |
| Class III      | ± 1.0 mm                 | ± 1.5 mm                 |

Note: Material Class is determined by material type:
  Steel → Class I  |    Aluminum → Class II  |    Composite → Class III

spec_text:
SPEC-MP-310: Mounting Plate MP-310 Design Requirements
Material: Aluminum 6061-T6

Rule R2: Edge distance requirements depend on hole zone:
  (a) Zone A: edge distance ≥ 1.5× hole diameter
  (b) Zone B: edge distance ≥ 1.5× hole diameter

Rule R1: Hole diameters shall conform to the tolerances specified in Table A based on Material Class.
  Nominal diameter for Zone A holes: 8.0 mm.
  Nominal diameter for Zone B holes: 14.0 mm.

Rule R3: For Material Class II, the minimum hole-to-hole spacing in Zone A shall be 35.0 mm.
  Rule R3 does not apply to Zone B.

Rule R4: All bolt holes must be populated with fasteners. Empty holes are not permitted in the final assembly.

Table A: Diameter tolerances by Material Class
| Material Class | Small holes (nom ≤ 10mm) | Large holes (nom > 10mm) |
|----------------|--------------------------|--------------------------|
| Class I        | ± 0.3 mm                 | ± 0.4 mm                 |
| Class II       | ± 0.8 mm                 | ± 0.5 mm                 |
| Class III      | ± 1.0 mm                 | ± 1.5 mm                 |

Note: Material Class is determined by material type:
  Steel → Class I  |    Aluminum → Class II  |    Composite → Class III

SPEC-GP-461: Guide Plate GP-461 Design Requirements
Material: Steel AISI 1018

Rule R4: All bolt holes must be populated with fasteners. Empty holes are not permitted in the final assembly.

Rule R2: Edge distance requirements depend on hole zone:
  (a) Zone A: edge distance ≥ 2.0× hole diameter
  (b) Zone B: edge distance ≥ 1.5× hole diameter

  Rule R3 does not apply to Zone A.

Rule R1: Hole diameters shall conform to the tolerances specified in Table A based on Material Class.
  Nominal diameter for Zone A holes: 8.0 mm.
  Nominal diameter for Zone B holes: 12.0 mm.

Table A: Diameter tolerances by Material Class
| Material Class | Small holes (nom ≤ 10mm) | Large holes (nom > 10mm) |
|----------------|--------------------------|--------------------------|
| Class I        | ± 1.0 mm                 | ± 0.4 mm                 |
| Class II       | ± 0.5 mm                 | ± 0.8 mm                 |
| Class III      | ± 1.0 mm                 | ± 1.5 mm                 |

Note: Material Class is determined by material type:
  Steel → Class I  |    Aluminum → Class II  |    Composite → Class III

spec_text:
SPEC-MP-133: Mounting Plate MP-133 Design Requirements
Material: Steel AISI 1018

Rule R3: For Material Class I, the minimum hole-to-hole spacing in Zone B shall be 35.0 mm.
  Rule R3 does not apply to Zone A.

Rule R2: Edge distance requirements depend on hole zone:
  (a) Zone A: edge distance ≥ 1.5× hole diameter
  (b) Zone B: edge distance ≥ 1.5× hole diameter

Rule R4: All bolt holes must be populated with fasteners. Empty holes are not permitted in the final assembly.

Rule R1: Hole diameters shall conform to the tolerances specified in Table A based on Material Class.
  Nominal diameter for Zone A holes: 6.0 mm.
  Nominal diameter for Zone B holes: 16.0 mm.

Table A: Diameter tolerances by Material Class
| Material Class | Small holes (nom ≤ 10mm) | Large holes (nom > 10mm) |
|----------------|--------------------------|--------------------------|
| Class I        | ± 0.8 mm                 | ± 0.4 mm                 |
| Class II       | ± 0.5 mm                 | ± 0.8 mm                 |
| Class III      | ± 1.0 mm                 | ± 1.5 mm                 |

Note: Material Class is determined by material type:
  Steel → Class I  |    Aluminum → Class II  |    Composite → Class III

spec_text:
SPEC-FP-877: Flange Plate FP-877 Design Requirements
Material: Aluminum 6061-T6

Rule R4: All bolt holes must be populated with fasteners. Empty holes are not permitted in the final assembly.

Rule R2: Edge distance requirements depend on hole zone:
  (a) Zone A: edge distance ≥ 1.5× hole diameter
  (b) Zone B: edge distance ≥ 1.5× hole diameter

Rule R1: Hole diameters shall conform to the tolerances specified in Table A based on Material Class.
  Nominal diameter for Zone A holes: 8.0 mm.
  Nominal diameter for Zone B holes: 12.0 mm.

Rule R3: For Material Class II, the minimum hole-to-hole spacing in Zone B shall be 35.0 mm.
  Rule R3 does not apply to Zone A.

Table A: Diameter tolerances by Material Class
| Material Class | Small holes (nom ≤ 10mm) | Large holes (nom > 10mm) |
|----------------|--------------------------|--------------------------|
| Class I        | ± 0.3 mm                 | ± 0.4 mm                 |
| Class II       | ± 0.4 mm                 | ± 1.0 mm                 |
| Class III      | ± 1.0 mm                 | ± 1.5 mm                 |

Note: Material Class is determined by material type:
  Steel → Class I  |    Aluminum → Class II  |    Composite → Class III

spec_text:
SPEC-FP-668: Flange Plate FP-668 Design Requirements
Material: Steel AISI 1018

Rule R4: All bolt holes must be populated with fasteners. Empty holes are not permitted in the final assembly.

Rule R3: For Material Class I, the minimum hole-to-hole spacing in Zone A shall be 30.0 mm.
  Rule R3 does not apply to Zone B.

Rule R2: Edge distance requirements depend on hole zone:
  (a) Zone A: edge distance ≥ 1.5× hole diameter
  (b) Zone B: edge distance ≥ 1.5× hole diameter

Rule R1: Hole diameters shall conform to the tolerances specified in Table A based on Material Class.
  Nominal diameter for Zone A holes: 10.0 mm.
  Nominal diameter for Zone B holes: 12.0 mm.

Table A: Diameter tolerances by Material Class
| Material Class | Small holes (nom ≤ 10mm) | Large holes (nom > 10mm) |
|----------------|--------------------------|--------------------------|
| Class I        | ± 0.5 mm                 | ± 0.8 mm                 |
| Class II       | ± 0.5 mm                 | ± 0.8 mm                 |
| Class III      | ± 1.0 mm                 | ± 1.5 mm                 |

Note: Material Class is determined by material type:
  Steel → Class I  |    Aluminum → Class II  |    Composite → Class III

spec_text:
SPEC-BP-333: Bracket Plate BP-333 Design Requirements
Material: Steel AISI 1018

Rule R4: All bolt holes must be populated with fasteners. Empty holes are not permitted in the final assembly.

Rule R3: For Material Class I, the minimum hole-to-hole spacing in Zone B shall be 30.0 mm.
  Rule R3 does not apply to Zone A.

Rule R2: Edge distance requirements depend on hole zone:
  (a) Zone A: edge distance ≥ 2.0× hole diameter
  (b) Zone B: edge distance ≥ 1.5× hole diameter

Rule R1: Hole diameters shall conform to the tolerances specified in Table A based on Material Class.
  Nominal diameter for Zone A holes: 8.0 mm.
  Nominal diameter for Zone B holes: 12.0 mm.

Table A: Diameter tolerances by Material Class
| Material Class | Small holes (nom ≤ 10mm) | Large holes (nom > 10mm) |
|----------------|--------------------------|--------------------------|
| Class I        | ± 1.0 mm                 | ± 0.5 mm                 |
| Class II       | ± 0.5 mm                 | ± 0.8 mm                 |
| Class III      | ± 1.0 mm                 | ± 1.5 mm                 |

Note: Material Class is determined by material type:
  Steel → Class I  |    Aluminum → Class II  |    Composite → Class III

spec_text:
SPEC-GP-423: Guide Plate GP-423 Design Requirements
Material: Composite CFRP

Rule R4: All bolt holes must be populated with fasteners. Empty holes are not permitted in the final assembly.

Rule R1: Hole diameters shall conform to the tolerances specified in Table A based on Material Class.
  Nominal diameter for Zone A holes: 8.0 mm.
  Nominal diameter for Zone B holes: 12.0 mm.

Rule R3: For Material Class III, the minimum hole-to-hole spacing in Zone B shall be 35.0 mm.
  Rule R3 does not apply to Zone A.

Rule R2: Edge distance requirements depend on hole zone:
  (a) Zone A: edge distance ≥ 2.0× hole diameter
  (b) Zone B: edge distance ≥ 1.5× hole diameter

Table A: Diameter tolerances by Material Class
| Material Class | Small holes (nom ≤ 10mm) | Large holes (nom > 10mm) |
|----------------|--------------------------|--------------------------|
| Class I        | ± 0.3 mm                 | ± 0.4 mm                 |
| Class II       | ± 0.5 mm                 | ± 0.8 mm                 |
| Class III      | ± 0.3 mm                 | ± 1.0 mm                 |

Note: Material Class is determined by material type:
  Steel → Class I  |    Aluminum → Class II  |    Composite → Class III

spec_text:
SPEC-SP-879: Support Plate SP-879 Design Requirements
Material: Steel AISI 1018

Rule R2: Edge distance requirements depend on hole zone:
  (a) Zone A: edge distance ≥ 1.5× hole diameter
  (b) Zone B: edge distance ≥ 1.5× hole diameter

Rule R3: For Material Class I, the minimum hole-to-hole spacing in Zone A shall be 30.0 mm.
  Rule R3 does not apply to Zone B.

Rule R4: All bolt holes must be populated with fasteners. Empty holes are not permitted in the final assembly.

Rule R1: Hole diameters shall conform to the tolerances specified in Table A based on Material Class.
  Nominal diameter for Zone A holes: 6.0 mm.
  Nominal diameter for Zone B holes: 12.0 mm.

Table A: Diameter tolerances by Material Class
| Material Class | Small holes (nom ≤ 10mm) | Large holes (nom > 10mm) |
|----------------|--------------------------|--------------------------|
| Class I        | ± 0.8 mm                 | ± 1.0 mm                 |
| Class II       | ± 0.5 mm                 | ± 0.8 mm                 |
| Class III      | ± 1.0 mm                 | ± 1.5 mm                 |

Note: Material Class is determined by material type:
  Steel → Class I  |    Aluminum → Class II  |    Composite → Class III

spec_text:
SPEC-SP-480: Support Plate SP-480 Design Requirements
Material: Aluminum 6061-T6

Rule R4: All bolt holes must be populated with fasteners. Empty holes are not permitted in the final assembly.

Rule R3: For Material Class II, the minimum hole-to-hole spacing in Zone A shall be 35.0 mm.
  Rule R3 does not apply to Zone B.

Rule R2: Edge distance requirements depend on hole zone:
  (a) Zone A: edge distance ≥ 1.5× hole diameter
  (b) Zone B: edge distance ≥ 1.5× hole diameter

Rule R1: Hole diameters shall conform to the tolerances specified in Table A based on Material Class.
  Nominal diameter for Zone A holes: 8.0 mm.
  Nominal diameter for Zone B holes: 14.0 mm.

Table A: Diameter tolerances by Material Class
| Material Class | Small holes (nom ≤ 10mm) | Large holes (nom > 10mm) |
|----------------|--------------------------|--------------------------|
| Class I        | ± 0.3 mm                 | ± 0.4 mm                 |
| Class II       | ± 0.3 mm                 | ± 0.4 mm                 |
| Class III      | ± 1.0 mm                 | ± 1.5 mm                 |

Note: Material Class is determined by material type:
  Steel → Class I  |    Aluminum → Class II  |    Composite → Class III

spec_text:
SPEC-GP-837: Guide Plate GP-837 Design Requirements
Material: Aluminum 6061-T6

Rule R3: For Material Class II, the minimum hole-to-hole spacing in Zone A shall be 30.0 mm.
  Rule R3 does not apply to Zone B.

Rule R4: All bolt holes must be populated with fasteners. Empty holes are not permitted in the final assembly.

Rule R1: Hole diameters shall conform to the tolerances specified in Table A based on Material Class.
  Nominal diameter for Zone A holes: 8.0 mm.
  Nominal diameter for Zone B holes: 14.0 mm.

Rule R2: Edge distance requirements depend on hole zone:
  (a) Zone A: edge distance ≥ 1.5× hole diameter
  (b) Zone B: edge distance ≥ 1.5× hole diameter

Table A: Diameter tolerances by Material Class
| Material Class | Small holes (nom ≤ 10mm) | Large holes (nom > 10mm) |
|----------------|--------------------------|--------------------------|
| Class I        | ± 0.3 mm                 | ± 0.4 mm                 |
| Class II       | ± 0.8 mm                 | ± 0.5 mm                 |
| Class III      | ± 1.0 mm                 | ± 1.5 mm                 |

Note: Material Class is determined by material type:
  Steel → Class I  |    Aluminum → Class II  |    Composite → Class III

spec_text:
SPEC-FP-365: Flange Plate FP-365 Design Requirements
Material: Aluminum 6061-T6

Rule R2: Edge distance requirements depend on hole zone:
  (a) Zone A: edge distance ≥ 1.5× hole diameter
  (b) Zone B: edge distance ≥ 1.5× hole diameter

Rule R3: For Material Class II, the minimum hole-to-hole spacing in Zone B shall be 25.0 mm.
  Rule R3 does not apply to Zone A.

Rule R4: All bolt holes must be populated with fasteners. Empty holes are not permitted in the final assembly.

Rule R1: Hole diameters shall conform to the tolerances specified in Table A based on Material Class.
  Nominal diameter for Zone A holes: 6.0 mm.
  Nominal diameter for Zone B holes: 12.0 mm.

Table A: Diameter tolerances by Material Class
| Material Class | Small holes (nom ≤ 10mm) | Large holes (nom > 10mm) |
|----------------|--------------------------|--------------------------|
| Class I        | ± 0.3 mm                 | ± 0.4 mm                 |
| Class II       | ± 1.0 mm                 | ± 0.8 mm                 |
| Class III      | ± 1.0 mm                 | ± 1.5 mm                 |

Note: Material Class is determined by material type:
  Steel → Class I  |    Aluminum → Class II  |    Composite → Class III

spec_text:
SPEC-SP-932: Support Plate SP-932 Design Requirements
Material: Steel AISI 1018

Rule R1: Hole diameters shall conform to the tolerances specified in Table A based on Material Class.
  Nominal diameter for Zone A holes: 6.0 mm.
  Nominal diameter for Zone B holes: 12.0 mm.

Rule R3: For Material Class I, the minimum hole-to-hole spacing in Zone A shall be 20.0 mm.
  Rule R3 does not apply to Zone B.

Rule R4: All bolt holes must be populated with fasteners. Empty holes are not permitted in the final assembly.

Rule R2: Edge distance requirements depend on hole zone:
  (a) Zone A: edge distance ≥ 2.0× hole diameter
  (b) Zone B: edge distance ≥ 1.5× hole diameter

Table A: Diameter tolerances by Material Class
| Material Class | Small holes (nom ≤ 10mm) | Large holes (nom > 10mm) |
|----------------|--------------------------|--------------------------|
| Class I        | ± 0.4 mm                 | ± 0.3 mm                 |
| Class II       | ± 0.5 mm                 | ± 0.8 mm                 |
| Class III      | ± 1.0 mm                 | ± 1.5 mm                 |

Note: Material Class is determined by material type:
  Steel → Class I  |    Aluminum → Class II  |    Composite → Class III

spec_text:
SPEC-GP-366: Guide Plate GP-366 Design Requirements
Material: Steel AISI 1018

Rule R1: Hole diameters shall conform to the tolerances specified in Table A based on Material Class.
  Nominal diameter for Zone A holes: 6.0 mm.
  Nominal diameter for Zone B holes: 14.0 mm.

Rule R3: For Material Class I, the minimum hole-to-hole spacing in Zone B shall be 30.0 mm.
  Rule R3 does not apply to Zone A.

Rule R2: Edge distance requirements depend on hole zone:
  (a) Zone A: edge distance ≥ 2.0× hole diameter
  (b) Zone B: edge distance ≥ 1.5× hole diameter

Rule R4: All bolt holes must be populated with fasteners. Empty holes are not permitted in the final assembly.

Table A: Diameter tolerances by Material Class
| Material Class | Small holes (nom ≤ 10mm) | Large holes (nom > 10mm) |
|----------------|--------------------------|--------------------------|
| Class I        | ± 0.4 mm                 | ± 1.0 mm                 |
| Class II       | ± 0.5 mm                 | ± 0.8 mm                 |
| Class III      | ± 1.0 mm                 | ± 1.5 mm                 |

Note: Material Class is determined by material type:
  Steel → Class I  |    Aluminum → Class II  |    Composite → Class III

spec_text:
SPEC-MP-412: Mounting Plate MP-412 Design Requirements
Material: Composite CFRP

Rule R2: Edge distance requirements depend on hole zone:
  (a) Zone A: edge distance ≥ 1.5× hole diameter
  (b) Zone B: edge distance ≥ 1.5× hole diameter

Rule R3: For Material Class III, the minimum hole-to-hole spacing in Zone A shall be 30.0 mm.
  Rule R3 does not apply to Zone B.

Rule R1: Hole diameters shall conform to the tolerances specified in Table A based on Material Class.
  Nominal diameter for Zone A holes: 10.0 mm.
  Nominal diameter for Zone B holes: 12.0 mm.

Rule R4: All bolt holes must be populated with fasteners. Empty holes are not permitted in the final assembly.

Table A: Diameter tolerances by Material Class
| Material Class | Small holes (nom ≤ 10mm) | Large holes (nom > 10mm) |
|----------------|--------------------------|--------------------------|
| Class I        | ± 0.3 mm                 | ± 0.4 mm                 |
| Class II       | ± 0.5 mm                 | ± 0.8 mm                 |
| Class III      | ± 0.3 mm                 | ± 0.5 mm                 |

Note: Material Class is determined by material type:
  Steel → Class I  |    Aluminum → Class II  |    Composite → Class III

spec_text:
SPEC-MP-736: Mounting Plate MP-736 Design Requirements
Material: Aluminum 6061-T6

Rule R2: Edge distance requirements depend on hole zone:
  (a) Zone A: edge distance ≥ 2.5× hole diameter
  (b) Zone B: edge distance ≥ 1.5× hole diameter

Rule R3: For Material Class II, the minimum hole-to-hole spacing in Zone A shall be 30.0 mm.
  Rule R3 does not apply to Zone B.

Rule R4: All bolt holes must be populated with fasteners. Empty holes are not permitted in the final assembly.

Rule R1: Hole diameters shall conform to the tolerances specified in Table A based on Material Class.
  Nominal diameter for Zone A holes: 6.0 mm.
  Nominal diameter for Zone B holes: 12.0 mm.

Table A: Diameter tolerances by Material Class
| Material Class | Small holes (nom ≤ 10mm) | Large holes (nom > 10mm) |
|----------------|--------------------------|--------------------------|
| Class I        | ± 0.3 mm                 | ± 0.4 mm                 |
| Class II       | ± 0.3 mm                 | ± 0.5 mm                 |
| Class III      | ± 1.0 mm                 | ± 1.5 mm                 |

Note: Material Class is determined by material type:
  Steel → Class I  |    Aluminum → Class II  |    Composite → Class III

spec_text:
SPEC-FP-458: Flange Plate FP-458 Design Requirements
Material: Steel AISI 1018

Rule R1: Hole diameters shall conform to the tolerances specified in Table A based on Material Class.
  Nominal diameter for Zone A holes: 8.0 mm.
  Nominal diameter for Zone B holes: 14.0 mm.

Rule R2: Edge distance requirements depend on hole zone:
  (a) Zone A: edge distance ≥ 1.5× hole diameter
  (b) Zone B: edge distance ≥ 1.5× hole diameter

Rule R4: All bolt holes must be populated with fasteners. Empty holes are not permitted in the final assembly.

Rule R3: For Material Class I, the minimum hole-to-hole spacing in Zone B shall be 20.0 mm.
  Rule R3 does not apply to Zone A.

Table A: Diameter tolerances by Material Class
| Material Class | Small holes (nom ≤ 10mm) | Large holes (nom > 10mm) |
|----------------|--------------------------|--------------------------|
| Class I        | ± 0.8 mm                 | ± 0.5 mm                 |
| Class II       | ± 0.5 mm                 | ± 0.8 mm                 |
| Class III      | ± 1.0 mm                 | ± 1.5 mm                 |

Note: Material Class is determined by material type:
  Steel → Class I  |    Aluminum → Class II  |    Composite → Class III

spec_text:
SPEC-GP-140: Guide Plate GP-140 Design Requirements
Material: Composite CFRP

Rule R4: All bolt holes must be populated with fasteners. Empty holes are not permitted in the final assembly.

Rule R2: Edge distance requirements depend on hole zone:
  (a) Zone A: edge distance ≥ 1.5× hole diameter
  (b) Zone B: edge distance ≥ 1.5× hole diameter

Rule R3: For Material Class III, the minimum hole-to-hole spacing in Zone B shall be 25.0 mm.
  Rule R3 does not apply to Zone A.

Rule R1: Hole diameters shall conform to the tolerances specified in Table A based on Material Class.
  Nominal diameter for Zone A holes: 8.0 mm.
  Nominal diameter for Zone B holes: 14.0 mm.

Table A: Diameter tolerances by Material Class
| Material Class | Small holes (nom ≤ 10mm) | Large holes (nom > 10mm) |
|----------------|--------------------------|--------------------------|
| Class I        | ± 0.3 mm                 | ± 0.4 mm                 |
| Class II       | ± 0.5 mm                 | ± 0.8 mm                 |
| Class III      | ± 0.4 mm                 | ± 1.0 mm                 |

Note: Material Class is determined by material type:
  Steel → Class I  |    Aluminum → Class II  |    Composite → Class III

spec_text:
SPEC-SP-432: Support Plate SP-432 Design Requirements
Material: Steel AISI 1018

Rule R1: Hole diameters shall conform to the tolerances specified in Table A based on Material Class.
  Nominal diameter for Zone A holes: 6.0 mm.
  Nominal diameter for Zone B holes: 12.0 mm.

Rule R3: For Material Class I, the minimum hole-to-hole spacing in Zone A shall be 25.0 mm.
  Rule R3 does not apply to Zone B.

Rule R4: All bolt holes must be populated with fasteners. Empty holes are not permitted in the final assembly.

Rule R2: Edge distance requirements depend on hole zone:
  (a) Zone A: edge distance ≥ 1.5× hole diameter
  (b) Zone B: edge distance ≥ 1.5× hole diameter

Table A: Diameter tolerances by Material Class
| Material Class | Small holes (nom ≤ 10mm) | Large holes (nom > 10mm) |
|----------------|--------------------------|--------------------------|
| Class I        | ± 1.0 mm                 | ± 1.0 mm                 |
| Class II       | ± 0.5 mm                 | ± 0.8 mm                 |
| Class III      | ± 1.0 mm                 | ± 1.5 mm                 |

Note: Material Class is determined by material type:
  Steel → Class I  |    Aluminum → Class II  |    Composite → Class III

spec_text:
SPEC-SP-675: Support Plate SP-675 Design Requirements
Material: Aluminum 6061-T6

Rule R4: All bolt holes must be populated with fasteners. Empty holes are not permitted in the final assembly.

Rule R2: Edge distance requirements depend on hole zone:
  (a) Zone A: edge distance ≥ 2.0× hole diameter
  (b) Zone B: edge distance ≥ 1.5× hole diameter

Rule R1: Hole diameters shall conform to the tolerances specified in Table A based on Material Class.
  Nominal diameter for Zone A holes: 8.0 mm.
  Nominal diameter for Zone B holes: 12.0 mm.

Rule R3: For Material Class II, the minimum hole-to-hole spacing in Zone A shall be 35.0 mm.
  Rule R3 does not apply to Zone B.

Table A: Diameter tolerances by Material Class
| Material Class | Small holes (nom ≤ 10mm) | Large holes (nom > 10mm) |
|----------------|--------------------------|--------------------------|
| Class I        | ± 0.3 mm                 | ± 0.4 mm                 |
| Class II       | ± 0.5 mm                 | ± 0.8 mm                 |
| Class III      | ± 1.0 mm                 | ± 1.5 mm                 |

Note: Material Class is determined by material type:
  Steel → Class I  |    Aluminum → Class II  |    Composite → Class III

SPEC-SP-160: Support Plate SP-160 Design Requirements
Material: Aluminum 6061-T6

Rule R2: Edge distance requirements depend on hole zone:
  (a) Zone A: edge distance ≥ 2.0× hole diameter
  (b) Zone B: edge distance ≥ 1.5× hole diameter

Rule R1: Hole diameters shall conform to the tolerances specified in Table A based on Material Class.
  Nominal diameter for Zone A holes: 6.0 mm.
  Nominal diameter for Zone B holes: 14.0 mm.

Rule R3: For Material Class II, the minimum hole-to-hole spacing in Zone B shall be 20.0 mm.
  Rule R3 does not apply to Zone A.

Rule R4: All bolt holes must be populated with fasteners. Empty holes are not permitted in the final assembly.

Table A: Diameter tolerances by Material Class
| Material Class | Small holes (nom ≤ 10mm) | Large holes (nom > 10mm) |
|----------------|--------------------------|--------------------------|
| Class I        | ± 0.3 mm                 | ± 0.4 mm                 |
| Class II       | ± 1.0 mm                 | ± 0.8 mm                 |
| Class III      | ± 1.0 mm                 | ± 1.5 mm                 |

Note: Material Class is determined by material type:
  Steel → Class I  |    Aluminum → Class II  |    Composite → Class III

spec_text:
SPEC-MP-406: Mounting Plate MP-406 Design Requirements
Material: Steel AISI 1018

Rule R3: For Material Class I, the minimum hole-to-hole spacing in Zone B shall be 30.0 mm.
  Rule R3 does not apply to Zone A.

Rule R1: Hole diameters shall conform to the tolerances specified in Table A based on Material Class.
  Nominal diameter for Zone A holes: 6.0 mm.
  Nominal diameter for Zone B holes: 14.0 mm.

Rule R4: All bolt holes must be populated with fasteners. Empty holes are not permitted in the final assembly.

Rule R2: Edge distance requirements depend on hole zone:
  (a) Zone A: edge distance ≥ 1.5× hole diameter
  (b) Zone B: edge distance ≥ 1.5× hole diameter

Table A: Diameter tolerances by Material Class
| Material Class | Small holes (nom ≤ 10mm) | Large holes (nom > 10mm) |
|----------------|--------------------------|--------------------------|
| Class I        | ± 0.8 mm                 | ± 0.3 mm                 |
| Class II       | ± 0.5 mm                 | ± 0.8 mm                 |
| Class III      | ± 1.0 mm                 | ± 1.5 mm                 |

Note: Material Class is determined by material type:
  Steel → Class I  |    Aluminum → Class II  |    Composite → Class III

spec_text:
SPEC-FP-568: Flange Plate FP-568 Design Requirements
Material: Composite CFRP

Rule R2: Edge distance requirements depend on hole zone:
  (a) Zone A: edge distance ≥ 1.5× hole diameter
  (b) Zone B: edge distance ≥ 1.5× hole diameter

Rule R1: Hole diameters shall conform to the tolerances specified in Table A based on Material Class.
  Nominal diameter for Zone A holes: 8.0 mm.
  Nominal diameter for Zone B holes: 12.0 mm.

Rule R3: For Material Class III, the minimum hole-to-hole spacing in Zone A shall be 20.0 mm.
  Rule R3 does not apply to Zone B.

Rule R4: All bolt holes must be populated with fasteners. Empty holes are not permitted in the final assembly.

Table A: Diameter tolerances by Material Class
| Material Class | Small holes (nom ≤ 10mm) | Large holes (nom > 10mm) |
|----------------|--------------------------|--------------------------|
| Class I        | ± 0.3 mm                 | ± 0.4 mm                 |
| Class II       | ± 0.5 mm                 | ± 0.8 mm                 |
| Class III      | ± 0.8 mm                 | ± 0.5 mm                 |

Note: Material Class is determined by material type:
  Steel → Class I  |    Aluminum → Class II  |    Composite → Class III
